data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the sending or existence of email confirmations after bookings are made. The successful booking evidence does not include any indication of email confirmations being sent, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of email confirmations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
